{
  "name": "servercn-stateful-auth",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "main": "dist/server.js",
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "cross-env NODE_ENV=development npx tsx watch src/server.ts",
    "build": "rm -rf dist && tsc && tsc-alias",
    "start": "cross-env NODE_ENV=production node dist/server.js",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
    "docs": "node swagger.config.ts",
    "prepare": "husky",
    "lint:check": "eslint .",
    "lint:fix": "eslint . --fix",
    "format:check": "npx prettier . --check",
    "format:fix": "npx prettier . --write"
  },
  "lint-staged": {
    "src/**/*.ts": [
      "eslint --fix",
      "prettier --write",
      "tsc --noEmit"
    ]
  },
  "devDependencies": {},
  "dependencies": {}
}
npx lint-staged

{
  "name": "my-express-app",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "main": "dist/server.js",
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "cross-env NODE_ENV=development npx tsx watch src/server.ts",
    "build": "rm -rf dist && tsc && tsc-alias",
    "start": "cross-env NODE_ENV=production node  dist/server.js",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
    "docs": "node swagger.config.ts",
    "format:check": "npx prettier . --check",
    "format:fix": "npx prettier . --write",
    "lint:check": "eslint .",
    "lint:fix": "eslint . --fix",
    "prepare": "husky"
  },
  "lint-staged": {
    "src/**/*.ts": [
      "eslint --fix",
      "prettier --write"
    ],
    "*.json": [
      "prettier --write"
    ]
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@commitlint/cli": "^20.3.1",
    "@commitlint/config-conventional": "^20.3.1",
    "@types/cookie-parser": "^1.4.10",
    "@types/cors": "^2.8.19",
    "@types/express": "^5.0.6",
    "@types/helmet": "^0.0.48",
    "@types/morgan": "^1.9.10",
    "@types/multer": "^2.0.0",
    "@types/node": "^24.10.0",
    "@types/nodemailer": "^7.0.5",
    "@types/passport": "^1.0.17",
    "@types/passport-github2": "^1.2.9",
    "@types/passport-google-oauth20": "^2.0.17",
    "@types/swagger-ui-express": "^4.1.8",
    "@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin": "^8.57.0",
    "@typescript-eslint/parser": "^8.57.0",
    "eslint": "^10.0.3",
    "eslint-plugin-prettier": "^5.5.5",
    "husky": "^9.1.7",
    "morgan": "^1.10.1",
    "prettier": "^3.8.1",
    "tsc-alias": "^1.8.16",
    "tsx": "^4.21.0",
    "typescript": "^5.9.3"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "argon2": "^0.44.0",
    "cloudinary": "^2.9.0",
    "cookie-parser": "^1.4.7",
    "cors": "^2.8.5",
    "cross-env": "^10.1.0",
    "dotenv-flow": "^4.1.0",
    "express": "^5.2.1",
    "express-rate-limit": "^8.2.1",
    "helmet": "^8.1.0",
    "mongoose": "^9.1.4",
    "multer": "^2.0.2",
    "nodemailer": "^7.0.12",
    "passport": "^0.7.0",
    "passport-github2": "^0.1.12",
    "passport-google-oauth20": "^2.0.0",
    "pino": "^10.2.0",
    "pino-pretty": "^13.1.3",
    "resend": "^6.9.3",
    "swagger-autogen": "^2.23.7",
    "swagger-ui-express": "^5.0.1",
    "zod": "^4.3.5"
  }
}
npx lint-staged
